entry.title: Pre and Post Test logic
entry.content:
Hi

We are currently looking for utilizing pre and post test function in our class/schedule.Are they ways that we can set the logic that pre-test can be done x hours before the class start (based on set agenda) and post-test can be done x hours after the class end.

Thankyou in advance

entry.title: Re: Containerizing SAP S/4HANA Systems with Docker
entry.content:
Hello @eloibermejo_spirit21 !
Thank you for your good questions; I will try to answer some of them.

When comparing VMs and containers I would suggest using containers for stateless scenarios such as:

  • Lightweight development environments, where you can bring the repository/dictionary to an ABAP system using git tools like gCTS or abapGit.
  • Test systems, where you can restore a DB dump for regression testing and test automation.
  • Agile development, where automated testing (ABAP or UI5) is a priority, and the test runtime could be containerized.

As you mentioned, for HA/DR scenarios or horizontal scalability, containers can be a viable option, but an orchestrator like Kubernetes is required. However, I don't see the option for PRD system containerization due to performance concerns (a system in a container will be slower compared to hardware or VMs). Similarly, DB containerization is not recommended for the same performance reasons.

Regarding lightweight S/4HANA dev system - we should define what is "lightweight". It is possible to run an empty S/4HANA system (full) with 85GB RAM in a container. However, if you need a full copy of your current DEV system, the requirements will be much higher. In terms of cost, I have personal experience running two Kubernetes clusters with eight S/4HANA 2022 containers in Azure for six months. This solution was cheaper compared to running VMs in an on-premise data center, but this might have been a specific case.

For upgrades the situation is similar to upgrading on-prem systems.I don’t think it would be feasible to build images that work for all customers, and I can see 2 options:

  • Upgrade of development system (or any system in the landscape) and database export / import into container with a freshly installed S/4HANA system
  • Generate a new stack XML and perform the upgrade directly within the container

For persistence layer you can mount a DB directory (e.g., /hana) so that all changes remain available even after a container rebuild. However, this approach breaks the stateless principle. Alternatively, you can connect the container to a separate DB instance.

For other resource you can check this article or Deploying SAP S/4HANA Containers with Kubernetes (second part of Andrew's story). Also, feel free to describe scenarios you think could be useful and we will try to build it in our environment.

Regards,
Maxim

entry.title: Use of Project Item in 4GT Scope Id.
entry.content:
Hi,

In 4GT SCOPE ID (SOLUTION ORDER MANAGEMENT). what is the use of the project item in Manage Solution Order App? Is there a real time business scenario where we can use both service item and project item. Can you give me an example of the same?

 

Secondly, Is it possible to link an EPPM project to solution order or can we run a production cycle in professional service project

entry.title: How to add more records to an existing sap standard segment in IDOC Basic Type DEBMAS07
entry.content:
Hi ABAP/IDOC/ALE experts,

I am currently working on an IDOC with basic type DEBMAS07.

There were missing records for the segment E1KNVIM and just need to add a few more records.

The question is how can I add a couple more records for this segment?

Do you know what BADI or User Exit can I use?

Thanks & hope to get your reply soon.

New cloud guy

entry.title: There's nothing to show yet - Compensation Portlet
entry.content:

Does anyone experienced data not showing in the portlet even if the right permission was given?

This is in particular with Compensation Information, but if you open the history page or View All you can see that there are data.

Thank you!

Regards,

Gelo

entry.title: Re: Not able to purchase one attempt for SAP certificatio...
entry.content: Hi Nagalakshmi, Booking through sap website is disabled for India region so you have to create a case using the link https://learning.sap.com/helpcenter/certification-support and the request the team to book it manually for you from backend. SAP training & adoption team will help you with payment procedure.

entry.title: SAP公有云系统折旧计算逻辑
entry.content:
SAP公有云系统折旧计算逻辑

资产计划折旧额的计算公式：折旧金额 = 基值·期间因子· 百分比

DEPRECIATION = BASE VALUE · PERIOD FACTOR · PERCENTAGE

 

1.    折旧码

以标准折旧码CD00为例，折旧码参数设置如下图

  • 基值：                                            24 – 账面净值
  • 基于剩余使用年限计算百分比：       X

 

2.    当前年度购置资产

1)    资产购置参数

资产购置于2024年8月，资本化日期 = 2024-08-30

资产购置原值 = 505,756.66 CNY

 

2)    折旧计算逻辑

资产计划折旧额计算逻辑的具体示例如下：

  • 基值：

由于首次资产购置年度是2024年8月，所以在2024年度，系统的折旧计算程序将整个资产会计年度期间划分为两部分。第一部分是基值为零的1月～8月，第二部分是基值为505,756.66 CNY的9月至12月。基值参数24代表取资产年初的账面净值，所以此示例中第二个期间细分的基值 = 505,756.66 CNY。

  • 期间因子：

期间因子计算的是不同期间细分的比例，例如第一个期间细分是2024年的1月～8月，所以其期间因子 = 8/12 = 0.666667；第二个期间细分是2024年的9月～12月，所以其期间因子 = 4/12 = 0.333333。

  • 百分比：

资产在分类账0L/折旧范围01下，使用年限 = 2年 = 24个期间，过期使用年限 = 0年0个期间。所以百分比 = 12/24= 0.500000

由以上数据计算得出资产2024年总折旧金额 = 基值·期间因子· 百分比 = 505,756.66*0.333333*0.500000 = 84,292.78 CNY，所以资产2024年的月折旧金额 = 84,292.78/4 = 21,073.20 CNY

 

3.    以前年度购置资产

1)    资产购置参数

资产购置于2023年6月，资本化日期 = 2023-06-25。

资产在分类账0L/折旧范围01下，使用年限 = 5年 = 60个期间。

 

资产购置原值 = 145,132.74 CNY，2024年初的账面净值 = 118,744.96 CNY

 

过期使用年限 = 0年7个期间

 

2)    折旧计算逻辑

资产计划折旧额计算逻辑的具体示例如下：

  • 基值：

由于首次资产购置年度是2023年6月，所以在2024年度，系统的折旧计算程序将整个资产会计年度期间划分为全年一个期间细分即可。基值参数24代表取资产年初的账面净值。所以此示例中第二个期间细分的基值 = 118,744.96 CNY。

  • 期间因子：

期间因子计算的是不同期间细分的比例，2024年只有一个期间细分的情况下，期间因子 = 1。

  • 百分比：

资产在分类账0L/折旧范围01下，使用年限 = 5年 = 60个期间，过期使用年限 = 0年7个期间。所以百分比 = 12/（60-7）= 0.226415

 

由以上数据计算得出资产2024年总折旧金额 = 基值·期间因子· 百分比 = 118,744.96*1*0.226415 = 26,885.65 CNY，所以资产2024年的月折旧金额 = 26,885.65/12 = 2,240.47 CNY

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Landed Costs with Fixed Assets shows error
entry.content:
Hi Javokhir_Isroilov,

Last time when we checked it we found that Landed cost function does not support Fixed assets items, it only processes Stock items.

Currently the only documents that are able to trigger the creation of a fixed assets posting are:

• A/P Invoice
• A/P Credit Memo
• A/P Correction Invoice
• A/P Correction Invoice Reversal
• A/R Invoice

Given that Landed Costs in not one of them, any increases of this asset should be posted via the Capitalization function of the Fixed Asset Module.

Our suggestion is to post additional transactions related to Fixed Asset via the Capitalization function.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: XML to CSV conversion in integration
entry.content:
In SAP Process Orchestration, 'content conversion' processes XML level 3 elements into CSV format. Note, the fieldNames do not influence the output CSV.

Conversely, in SAP Cloud Integration, the 'CSV to XML converter' generates CSV using the element names from the first record of the input XML. If a new element appears in subsequent records, it will be appended at the end of the line.

This difference in behavior can create challenges in migration projects. For PO interfaces with optional elements, fewer CSV columns are produced, whereas CPI interfaces will append optional fields at the end of the line. To manage these issues, you can use additional message mapping with a one-to-one mapWithDefault, although this will create columns even for optional elements. Another option is to use a Groovy script to create consistent elements (e.g., field1, field2, field3, and so on). Below is an example Groovy script:

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import groovy.xml.MarkupBuilder

def Message processData(Message message) {
    def stringWriter = new StringWriter()
    def xmlBuilder = new MarkupBuilder(stringWriter)
    def inputXml = new XmlSlurper().parseText(message.getBody(String))

    xmlBuilder.Root {
        inputXml.Record.each { record ->
            Record {
                record.children().eachWithIndex { element, index ->
                    "field${index + 1}"(element.text())
                }
            }
        }
    }

    message.setBody(stringWriter.toString())
    return message
}

You can use a Content Modifier after the 'XML to CSV Converter' if you want to prefix the header with actual field names instead of generic names like field1, field2, field3.

SAP Help Links:-

SAP PO - Converting File Content in a Sender Adapter

SAP Cloud Integration - Configure XML to CSV Converter - "When optional fields exists in the XML, the ordering is maintained in the order when a tag is encountered."

entry.title: 複数インスタンス構成のSLD Data Supplier実行について
entry.content:
複数サーバ(PAS、ASCS、AAS５台)構成でデータサプライヤを実行する場合のsldreg実行と
生成されるslddest.cfgについて確認させてください。
 
各サーバのsldregを実行する際の、slddest.cfgとキーの生成先は以下です。

 

ASCS
自サーバのF:\usr\sap\<SID>\SYS\globalに対して実行　
>sldreg -configure F:\usr\sap\<SID>\SYS\global\slddest.cfg -usekeyfile　　
 
PASとAASの5台分
構成上、ASCSのsapmntを指定して実行
>sldreg -configure \\<hostname>\sapmnt\<SID>\SYS\global\slddest.cfg -usekeyfile

結果、全台のsldreg.cfgをASCSサーバのF:\usr\sap\SID\SYS\global\配下に更新しています。

【ご確認】

(1)インスタンスが複数台に分かれてる場合、この実行方法で合ってますでしょうか。

(2)sldreg.cfgは複数台の実行結果が追加される仕様でしょうか、それとも、２回目以降の実行で既存設定を上書きしてしまいますでしょうか。

(3)弊社の想定が間違っている場合、どのシステムでsldregコマンドを実行するのが正しいでしょうか。

上記、(1)～(3)についてご回答いただきたく、
ご確認の程、よろしくお願いいたします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: 複数インスタンス構成のSLD Data Supplier実行について
entry.content:
下記リンクの総括情報を参照お願いします。

https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-focused-run/expert-portal/sld-ds-payload-distribution.html

entry.title: Re: In SAC Data Wrangler, can I generate multiple rows of...
entry.content: Yes Vivek you have to stage the base data first either in same model in a different version or in another model depending on data volumes and other design considerations. Once base data is in, Adv Formula can be used to generate the multiple records.

Anyone got resolution for this issue?

As we upgraded our SAP system from EHP7 SP10 to EHP7 SP27 recently, we are also facing this same issue and have been searching for a fix.

Kindly help with any SAP recommendation / SAP notes if anyone is aware of fixing this issue.

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

DR.

いただいた情報によりますとLMDBはまだ確認されていないため、現時点sldreg実行の必要性が見えません。もしLMDBにdata supplier関連エラー特定した場合、お手数ですが、下記KBAをご参照ください。
3232202 - Troubleshooting Guided Answer for missing or outdated LMDB Data Suppliers - SAP Solution Manager and SAP Focused Run

Thanks. 

Saurabh

Hello Team

I hope you're doing well.

Thank you for your assistance.

Regards,

Nil

entry.title: Re: Cloud Connector を使ってBTPとイントラネット内のAPI Gateway間でmTLS接続はできますか？
entry.content:
私だったらアプリのロールで制御するように設計します。
＞A社の人がB社用のアプリからAPIを叩く→認証を失敗にする
ユーザ視点だったらAPIコールしてエラーになるよりは、最初からその機能が使えないようにしてほしいです。
制御はいろんなレベルでできるとは思いますが、ビジネスシナリオを共有していただければ別レベルでのソリューションがベターな場合もあるかもしれないです。

entry.title: Re: how to delete a solution from prod system C4C sdk
entry.content:
Deletion of solutions in Production is not supported. They can only be disabled from the SDK. 

Deletion can be carried out in all of the other tenants (Dev, Test etc.)

Enable or Disable Your Solution in the SAP Cloud Solution | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Can I overlap production orders? (Not operations)
entry.content: Have a look at 'Distribution Key'. In the BOM item for distributing requirements and in the production version for distributing the receipts from planned/process/production order.

entry.title: Re: modifying the defaut email address in s4 output param...
entry.content:
Hi @Erwan_Prigent ,

In the OPD, Determination Step = Email Setting,
Select the required output type or another required condition parameter, and enter the "Sender Email", to the required condition.
This will replace the Default email Address.

Best Regards,
Surya.

entry.title: Re: Can Cloud Connector enable mTLS between BTP and my in...
entry.content:
Dear gregorw,

I've registered a mapping for a Virtual To Internal System in Cloud Connector, and its status is "Reachable" (Back-end Type: Non-SAP System, Principal Type: X.509 Certificate). I’ve also imported both the System Certificate and CA Certificate.

In BTP Destinations, I’ve configured the destination with the following settings:

Type: HTTP
URL: https://[Virtual Host set in Cloud Connector]
Proxy Type: OnPremise
Authentication: PrincipalPropagation
However, when my application uses this destination to call an API, I receive the error: {"message":"Domain not found"}.
There were no corresponding error logs recorded in the ljs_trace.log of the Cloud Connector.

Could this be an issue with the backend system?
I’ve already registered the CA Certificate (imported into Cloud Connector) in the backend system. Is this the correct approach?

Best regards,
moeka matsumura

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Excel Add-In Add Rows/Columns Ove...
entry.content:
@DBalinski 

It works fine for me. Just try it again. I just select the last column and add insert column > single and then added the formula to it.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Historical data processing of organizational structure
entry.content:
Hello

SAP do not have provision to physically delete any Organizational Structure Entity for an activated SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system. Once an organizational unit or assignment is confirmed, it cannot be deleted or unassigned. Our suggestion is to maintain description of the unwanted record as DO NOT USE.

This is also valid to any of the organizational units (Service Structure, for instance) that are covered by the app: once activated, deletion is not possible, and any org unit relationship created by SAP best practice content scoping bundles.

Once the org unit or relationship has been activated this may be being used in several other tables and transactions, so any attempt to delete this entry could potentially lead to system inconsistencies.

What is possible is the deprecation of certain org units. This requires an SAP expert configuration which needs to be requested by the customer and signed off, because an SAP service employee will do the requested changes within the customers SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system. Currently we can deprecate these org units:

Storage Location, Purchasing Organization, Shipping Point, Sales Group, Sales Office.

The deprecation can be revoked, this has the consequence that the name of the deprecated org unit cannot be used again or twice.

Pre- requisites the customer MUST perform before a deprecation takes place:

· All the in transit documents related to the Storage Locations needs to be closed. Otherwise, an error will show in deprecation.

· All the related material stock needs to be cleared. Otherwise, an error will show in deprecation. What steps should be done for the clean-up.

· The Storage location must not be referenced by any Kanban Control cycle or Handling Unit

· The Storage location must not be Warehouse managed, so please delete all assignments here.

· The Storage location must not be referenced in any QM customizing, Inspection Lots, Material Samples, Quality Notifications or Defects

  For MRP (material requirements planning) related  issues please unassign the MRP area to SLOC/Plant using SSCUI 103068.

· All tasks must be done in all systems (Productive, Test, Development)

entry.title: RFC Connection Error
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are facing below error when we do RFC call from SAP Commerce Cloud to On-Prem SAP ECC system.
We have NAT configured at both side. 
Also we are using the Azure VM to forward request to On-Prem system using nginx.
SAP Commerce Cloud -> AzureVM nginx -> On-Prem SAP ECC

Error Details

 

 

Script execution has failed [reason: com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (102) JCO_ERROR_COMMUNICATION: Initialization of destination MANAGEMENT failed: Connect from SAP gateway to RFC server failed
	connection parameters: TYPE=A DESTINATION=MANAGEMENT ASHOST=<NAT IP> SYSNR=00 PCS=1

LOCATION
    SAP-Gateway on host <HOST NAME> / sapgw00
ERROR
       timeout during allocate
TIME
        Mon Dec 16 14:10:29 2024
RELEASE
     753
COMPONENT
   SAP-Gateway
VERSION
     2
RC
          242
MODULE
      /bas/753_REL/src/krn/si/gw/gwr3cpic.c
LINE
        2218
DETAIL
      no connect of TP sapdp00 from host <NAT IP> after 20 sec
COUNTER
     2
]

 

 

 #CCV2 SAP Commerce Cloud  #ECC #RFC 

Thank you.

Question and Answer:
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Manage Systems

Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Cloud Systems

Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Cloud System Provisioning

Q: What issue do you have with Provisioning app?
A:


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Matyas

entry.title: Re: 两家公司皆使用IFRS会计原则，需要激活1GA吗?
entry.content:
Hi @Alice_Ying ,

參考您提供的Help portal後有幾個問題想再確認，
我在此說明，系統中未來會有兩個公司代碼，6310/國家為TW 以及6210/國家為HK，目前兩家公司皆遵照IFRS會計原則，並且未來有規劃使用Group reporting的功能(包含合併沖銷)

  • 問題1：激活1GA後，分類帳組合建議選擇方案1還是方案2？
    方案0L2L
    1TW：IFRS
    HK：IFRS    		TW：TW本地化會計原則
    HK：HK本地化會計原則
    2TW：IFRS
    HK：IFRS    		TW：IFRS
    HK：IFRS
  • 問題2：未來有規劃使用集團合併(Group reporting)，根據Help portal的說明，請問是否需要激活5W2？
    若不激活5W2，未來要使用集團合併時是否就無法進行集團合併沖銷功能？或是有沒有集團合併功能會被限制？


    以上再麻煩您協助回覆，謝謝。
    Best Regards,
    Alice

entry.title: Re: Query mechanism problem during SAP HANA recovery
entry.content: One more thing to add is that when I removed “CHECK ACCESS USING BACKINT” from the recovery command, after the recovery was initiated, the SAP HANA database no longer queried the past complete data volumes one by one, but directly restored the corresponding correct data.

entry.title: When I use F110 the FB data has been creaded with the Account holder is space。
entry.content:
When using Onetime BP and regular BP for automatic payment, the FB data has been creaded  with the Account holder is space。

However, when the proposal was submitted,  Account holder have the value.

Onetime BP and regular BP have the same Account holder。

Can you help me confirm why the value of   Account holder becomes blank。

entry.title: Re: Tenant and domain in SAP Analytic Cloud
entry.content: There should be no any feature difference. Domain name of SAC tenant has been changing over years, different year of tenant prevision might have different domain name.

entry.title: Bank Integration through API
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are in process of API based Bank Integration where the data will be sent in a JASON file using CPI. We are not clear on:

1. What config we need to do in our system?

2. What program we need to maintain under FBZP> Payment method in Country > Use Classic payment medium programs (RFFO*)

Any other thing we need to consider?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: *Error* when creating STO in SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2402
entry.content:
Hi,

One of the reason for this error is missing Storage location within the STO. Can you try if the error is removed once you have the storage location maintained. 

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Re: Landed Costs with Fixed Assets shows error
entry.content: Hi Mr ANKIT CHAUHAN, Thanks for the detailed answer but I created Landed Cost document with Fixed Asset. The issue was that I was trying to create Landed Cost document from Goods Receipt PO, I changed way. I created Landed Cost from A/P Invoice and Capitalization also created automatically. Everythin is fine. Thanks for all!

entry.title: Re: Calculations in a specific planning version
entry.content: Very likely, data point of rates in not sharing the same of your source value on dimensions not specified in the formula like department and others.

entry.title: Re: Can we reassign job requisitions automatically in SAP...
entry.content:
Apart from the manual transfer via admin tool Reassign Job Requisition, which you already know, to my knowledge there is unfortunately no built-in automatism in SuccessFactors.

There should be possibilities via the OData API, but that would require the development of some kind of external integration / application which would extract data from SF, process it and then updates the requisitions accordingly.

BR
Sebastian

entry.title: Re: MDG Cloud Ready Mode: Custom Workflow template in SAP build process automation with S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Mustafa,

Here is the My inbox screenshot for the standard approval task from MDG cloud ready mode.

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Pool/parallel/ihm in HANA
entry.content: What is the significance of memory allocator - "Pool/parallel/ihm" in HANA?

entry.title: Re: Table Bugging dimensions
entry.content: It's difficult to understand your problem based on your description. But at least you can try to switch off 'Unbooked data' (untick) setting on the second(last ) dimension in row axis.

entry.title: Re: Inspection Lot XXXX for order XXXX does not have necessary status
entry.content: Hello Experts, can anyone help me on this pls, it's quite urgent. We need to close the order ASAP.

entry.title: Re: Landed Costs with Fixed Assets shows error
entry.content:
Hi all,
This issue was occured because I was trying to create Landed Cost from Goods Receipt PO. I changed the way and used A/P Invoice document for creation of Landed Cost. Problem is solved. Thanks for all.

entry.title: Re: Can Cloud Connector enable mTLS between BTP and my in...
entry.content:
Hi Moeka

have you configured "Host In Request Header" to "Use Internal Host":

Best regards,
Gregor

entry.title: Is it possible to access T Code FBL1N/FBL5N with restriction of Sp. GL type.
entry.content: Is it possible to access T code FBL1N/FBL5N with restriction of Spl. GL type? Please suggest.

entry.title: Re: Can we reassign job requisitions automatically in SAP...
entry.content:
@Sanjay789 wrote:

Can we reassign job requisitions automatically in SAP SF? If yes, how ? I know we can transfer requisition into other's name manually.

Hello @Sanjay789,
Yes, you can automatically reassign job requisitions in SAP SuccessFactors using Integration Center. Here's how:

  1. Navigate to Integration Center: Go to Admin Center > Integration Center.

  2. Create Integration: Select My Integrations > Create > More Integration Types. 3. Configure Trigger: Choose Trigger Type as Scheduled. Set Source and Destination as SuccessFactors. 4. Map Fields: Map the fields from the source job requisition to the destination job requisition. Ensure you include all necessary details.

For detailed instructions, refer to the SAP SuccessFactors documentation.

Does this help? Let me know if you need any further assistance!


Best regards,
James Goff

entry.title: Re: MDG Cloud Ready Mode: Custom Workflow template in SAP build process automation with S/4HANA
entry.content:
Thanks @0012anirban, 

It seems the user still needs to navigate to MDG via the provided link to review and update the change request information before approving.  In other words, the ability to view and edit details isn’t embedded directly within the My Inbox Task UI.

Given this, what is the advantage of integrating MDG with a Build Process Automation Workflow instead of relying on the traditional approach using SAP Business Workflow and BRF+?

entry.title: Re: Sell from Subcontractor - With Shipment Processing Part 1
entry.content: Many thanks for the informative blog.

entry.title: Re: Bank Integration through API
entry.content:
@forumuser wrote:

Dear Team,

We are in process of API based Bank Integration where the data will be sent in a JASON file using CPI. We are not clear on:

1. What config we need to do in our system?

2. What program we need to maintain under FBZP> Payment method in Country > Use Classic payment medium programs (RFFO*)

Any other thing we need to consider?

Thanks in advance

Hello @forumuser,
For your API-based bank integration using CPI (Cloud Platform Integration), here’s what you need to do:

  1. System Configuration: Ensure your system is correctly configured to send JSON files. Set up communication arrangements and define endpoints in SAP CPI.

  2. Maintain Program in FBZP: Under FBZP > Payment Methods in Country, choose the classic payment medium programs (RFFO*) applicable to your setup. You might need RFFOUS_T for US payments or RFFOD__S for SEPA payments.

Additionally, consider the following:

  • API Endpoints: Make sure your API endpoints are secure and well-documented.

  • Authentication: Implement proper authentication mechanisms like OAuth2 to protect your data transfer.

You can refer to the for detailed guidance.

Thanks in advance!


Best regards,
Jennifer Block

entry.title: Re: Stop Guessing! Use Case with Conversational AI Agents in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Very interesting. With the hana tool, I guess it can already accomplish the paper about Semantic Operators: A Declarative Model for Rich, AI-based Analytics Over Text Data and some similar experimental feature in google big query like this.

Looking forward to New Generative AI Tool Kit with SAP HANA Cloud in Q1 2025

entry.title: Customer Data Browser View for Customer Delivery Address
entry.content:
Hello 

Im trying to find in customer data browser a view to show the customer delivery address that I can then correlate to a billing document. What is the best view to use to extract this information? I use I_BILLINGDOCUMENT as a basis. 

Thanks

Adam

entry.title: Re: How to set X-CSRF-Token and Cookie as header parameters in REST adapter for POST Call?
entry.content:
Hi Team,
I have a similar requirement need to pass the csrf token dynamic to sap ecc 

Flow:
Bank-SAP PO-SAP ECC (synchronous)

Here I need to get and post csrf token(Dynamic) from sap ecc .
Incoming paylaod is encrypted json format
SAP PO is the passthrough scenario.
May i know how can i proceed in this case?

@former_member93735 I need your help.
Can some one please
Getting the token from ECC. and again send the token to ECC along with paylaod using sap po

entry.title: Re: 关于生产核算3F0的科目如何在财务报表中配置
entry.content:
Dear,

这几个科目在损益表中没有位置存在

损益表包括：收入，成本，费用，利息，投资，资产减值，营业外等报表项目。

而这几个科目可以理解为成本核算的暂时技术科目，和其他科目：生产成本-差异 汇总在一起发生额是零

但是需要保证 生产类的成本中心余额为零，实际成本差异结转和差异科目为零。

这样资产负债表中本期间的未分配利润减去前一期间的未分配利润 等于本期间的利润表的净利润。

Regards,

Sen

entry.title: Re: MDG Cloud Ready Mode: Custom Workflow template in SAP build process automation with S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Mustafa,

Yes, you are right it's not embedded at this moment and users need to navigate to MDG to review the details. If you see MDG cloud edition which is the SAAS version of MDG, the task UI shows all the details related to the business partner. But to the best of my knowledge, it can't be edited there, you need to go to MDG to edit it.

Coming to the benefits, Cloud ready mode is the steppingstone for the cloud first approach of SAP, which includes integration with Joule in 2023 FPS02. The MDG UI is native FIORI instead of web Dynpro, the validations can be done through MDG DQM instead of BADI. From a workflow perspective, building a workflow is easier in build process automation through drag and drop approach instead of coding heavy and BRF+ approach which are very technical.

Having said all this, we have to be cognizant of the fact that classic MDG has been around for more than 15 years and has evolved a lot during this time. Cloud ready mode now is more of an MVP product which is currently being aggressively worked upon by SAP.

Hope this helps, if you have any questions please do post it, for the benefits of the community.

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Re: Create 2 goal sections on PM Form from samegoal plan,...
entry.content:
Hi Ellen

This is possible. We have a PM form with the same configuration.

Add the following code in bold letters to your xml in objective section 1 of the PM form.

 


<obj-sect-type autosync="true"><![CDATA[plan]]></obj-sect-type>
      <obj-sect-plan-id>#</obj-sect-plan-id>
      <obj-category><![CDATA[Name of category 1]]></obj-category>
      <meta-grp-label><![CDATA[Group]]></meta-grp-label>
    </objective-sect>
 
I think it used to work only when the code is added in one section. (In the meantime it might also work when you add the code in both sections.) If you add the code in one section, the goals of the other goal plan category are automatically shown in the other PM Form section.
 
Have a good day!
Andrea

entry.title: Master Data and Configuration Relationships in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am working on setting up a new company configuration in SAP S/4HANA (version 2021). I want to understand how key master data elements and organizational units are related and what dependencies exist when creating them. Here's a list of the main elements I'm focusing on, along with their relevant database tables:

T000 - Client
T001 - Company Code
TKA01 - Controlling Area
TGSB - Business Area
CEPC - Profit Center
CSKS - Cost Center
PRPS - WBS
T001W - Plant
T001L - Storage Location
T024 - Purchasing Organization
T024E - Purchasing Group
BP001 - Business Partner
How are these entities related hierarchically, and what dependencies should I consider when configuring them?
EX, I know that when creating a Profit Center, it requires a Controlling Area. Similarly, creating a Storage Location requires a Plant.
Are there other dependencies like these I should be aware of?
Can someone provide a text-based ERD (Entity Relationship Diagram) or an example that maps out these relationships in a clear hierarchy?
Note:
If you have suggestions for adding other key master data to this list, please let me know.
Thanks in advance for your guidance!

entry.title: Developing CAP java/node.js mixed mono Multitenant SaaS Applications with Shared Database
entry.content:
Introduction

In this blog post, we will guide you through the process of creating a multitenant SaaS application with a shared database architecture, combining CAP Java and Node.js projects into a mono repository.

Step 1: Initialize the Project

1. Initialize the main project:

 

cds init onboarding 
rm -rf app srv​​

 

2. Initialize sub-module projects within the main project:

 

cds init node_project 
cds init java_project --java​​

 

3. Set up the workspace:

 

npm init -w ./node_project -w ./java_project

 

Step 2: Configure Multitenancy and HANA:

1. add multitenancy & hana

2. inside onboarding/mtx/sidecar/package.json, add build command in scripts.

 

"scripts": {
    "start": "cds-serve",
    "build": "cds build ../.. --for mtx-sidecar --ws --production && npm ci --prefix gen"
}

 

3. Create a .cdsrc.json file at the root of the onboarding project:

 

"build": {
    "target": "."
  }
}

 

4.inside node_project/mtx/sidecar/package.json and java_project/mtx/sidecar/package.json, disable cds.xt.SaasProvisioningService:

 

"cds": {
    "requires": {
      "multitenancy": true,
      "extensibility": false,
      "toggles": false,
      "cds.xt.SaasProvisioningService": false,
      "db": {
        "kind": "hana-mt",
        "deploy-format": "hdbtable"
      }
}

 

5. Change the port of java_project/mtx/sidecar for local testing, e.g. 4006. Also change it in application.yaml.

 

"server": { 
      "port": 4006
}
cds:
  multi-tenancy:
    sidecar:
      url: http://localhost:4006/

 

6. Execute the build command in onboarding/mtx/sidecar. This will compose all DB artifacts from each workspace into the obboarding/db folder:

 

npm run build

 

Step 3: Deploy Database Artifacts

You can deploy the whole db artifacts with/without multitenancy.

1. For single tenant deployment:

 

cds build --ws --production
cds deploy --to hana:${hdi-name} --no-build

 

2. For multi-tenant deployment:

 

cds watch mtx/sidecar 
cds subscribe ${tenant_id} --to http://localhost:4005 -u name:password

 

Step 4: Start the Projects

1. Start java_project and java_project-mtx:

 

# run java mtx first 
cd java_project/mtx/sidecar 
npm run build 
cds watch 

# run java second 
cd java_project 
mvn spring-boot:run -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=default

 

2. Start node_project and (using onboarding-mtx or start node_project-mtx):

 

# start node_project-mtx(optional) 
cd node_project 
cds build --production 
cds watch mtx/sidecar 

# start node_project 
cd node_project 
cds watch

 

Step 5: Local Testing

You can now test both the Node.js and Java applications locally.

Step 6: Add MTA Configuration and Deploy to BTP

1.Add the build:cf command to the package.json file of each workspace:

 

"build:cf": "cds build --production"

 

2. Create an mta.yaml file with the following content:

 

ID: com.sap.onboarding-mtxs
_schema-version: 3.3.0
version: 0.0.1
description: "Onboarding Service"

build-parameters:
  before-all:
    - builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm ci
        - npm run build:cf --workspace=node_project
        - npm run build:cf --workspace=java_project
modules:
  - name: node-mtxs-srv
    type: nodejs
    path: node_project/gen/srv
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
      readiness-health-check-type: http
      readiness-health-check-http-endpoint: /health
    properties:
      DEBUG: all
    build-parameters:
      builder: npm
    provides:
      - name: srv_api # required by consumers of CAP services (e.g. approuter)
        properties:
          url: ${default-url}
    requires:
      - name: onboarding-mtxs-service-manager
      - name: node-model-provider
        properties:
          CDS_MODEL_PROVIDER_URL: ~{url}
          CDS_MULTITENANCY_SIDECAR_URL: ~{url}
      - name: provisioning-service
        properties:
          CDS_MULTITENANCY_PROVISIONING_URL: ~{url}
          CDS_MULTITENANCY_PROVISIONING_POLLINGINTERVAL: 5s
          CDS_MULTITENANCY_PROVISIONING_POLLINGTIMEOUT: 5m
      - name: onboarding-mtxs-uaa
      - name: onboarding-mtxs-saas-registry

  - name: java-mtxs-srv
    type: java
    path: java_project/srv
    parameters:
      memory: 1024M
      disk-quota: 1024M
      buildpack: sap_java_buildpack
    properties:
      DEBUG: all
      JBP_CONFIG_COMPONENTS: "jres: ['com.sap.xs.java.buildpack.jdk.SAPMachineJDK']"
      JBP_CONFIG_SAP_MACHINE_JDK: '{ use_offline_repository: false, version: 21.+ }'
      JBP_CONFIG_JAVA_OPTS: "[java_opts: '-agentlib:jdwp=transport=dt_socket,address=8000,server=y,suspend=n,onjcmd=y']"
      SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE: cloud
      CDS_MULTITENANCY_MTXS_ENABLED: true
    build-parameters:
      ignore: [ "*.md" ]
      build-result: target/*.jar
    provides:
      - name: srv_java_api
        properties:
          url: '${default-url}'
    requires:
      - name: onboarding-mtxs-service-manager
      - name: java-model-provider
        properties:
          CDS_MODEL_PROVIDER_URL: ~{url}
          # CDS_MULTITENANCY_SIDECAR_URL: ~{url}
      - name: provisioning-service
        properties:
          CDS_MULTITENANCY_PROVISIONING_URL: ~{url}
          CDS_MULTITENANCY_PROVISIONING_POLLINGINTERVAL: 5s
          CDS_MULTITENANCY_PROVISIONING_POLLINGTIMEOUT: 5m
      - name: onboarding-mtxs-uaa

  - name: onboarding-mtxs-mtx
    type: nodejs
    path: mtx/sidecar
    parameters:
      memory: 512M
      disk-quota: 512M
    build-parameters:
      builder: custom
      build-result: gen
      commands:
        - npm run build
    properties:
      DEBUG: all
    requires:
      - name: onboarding-mtxs-uaa
      - name: onboarding-mtxs-service-manager
      - name: onboarding-mtxs-saas-registry
    provides:
      - name: provisioning-service
        properties:
          url: ${default-url}

  - name: onboarding-mtxs-node-model-provider
    type: nodejs
    path: node_project/gen/mtx/sidecar
    parameters:
      memory: 512M
      disk-quota: 512M
    build-parameters:
      builder: npm-ci
      # builder: custom
      # build-result: gen
      # commands:
      #   - npm run build
    properties:
      DEBUG: all
    requires:
      - name: onboarding-mtxs-uaa
      - name: onboarding-mtxs-service-manager
    provides:
      - name: node-model-provider
        properties:
          url: ${default-url}

  - name: onboarding-mtxs-java-model-provider
    type: nodejs
    path: java_project/mtx/sidecar
    parameters:
      memory: 512M
      disk-quota: 512M
    build-parameters:
      builder: custom
      build-result: gen
      commands:
        - npm run build
    properties:
      DEBUG: all
    requires:
      - name: onboarding-mtxs-uaa
      - name: onboarding-mtxs-service-manager
    provides:
      - name: java-model-provider
        properties:
          url: ${default-url}

resources:
  - name: onboarding-mtxs-service-manager
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: service-manager
      service-plan: container

  - name: onboarding-mtxs-uaa
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: xsuaa
      service-plan: broker
      config:
        xsappname: onboarding-mtxs-${org}-${space}
        tenant-mode: shared
        scopes:
          - name: $XSAPPNAME.mtcallback
            description: Multi Tenancy Callback Access
            grant-as-authority-to-apps:
              - $XSAPPNAME(application,sap-provisioning,tenant-onboarding)
          - name: $XSAPPNAME.mtdeployment
          - name: $XSAPPNAME.ExtendCDS
            description: Extend tenant models
          - name: $XSAPPNAME.ExtendCDSdelete
            description: Undeploy extensions
        authorities:
          - $XSAPPNAME.mtcallback
          - $XSAPPNAME.mtdeployment
        role-templates:
          - name: admin
            description: Admin
            scope-references:
              - $XSAPPNAME.mtcallback
              - $XSAPPNAME.mtdeployment
          - name: ExtensionDeveloper
            scope-references:
              - $XSAPPNAME.ExtendCDS
              - uaa.user
            description: CDS Extension Developer
          - name: ExtensionDeveloperUndeploy
            scope-references:
              - $XSAPPNAME.ExtendCDSdelete
              - $XSAPPNAME.ExtendCDS
              - uaa.user
            description: CDS Extension Developer with DB extension undeploy privilege (potential data loss!)              -
  #   generate a user and password for dynamic hdi deployer
  - name: onboarding-mtxs-saas-registry
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: saas-registry
      service-plan: application
      config:
        appName: onboarding-mtxs-${org}-${space} # this is the text on the tile
        xsappname: onboarding-mtxs-${org}-${space} # this is exactly the value from xsuaa.parameters.config.xsappname
        appUrls:
          # getDependencies: ~{srv_api/url}/mt/v1.0/subscriptions/dependencies
          # onSubscription: ~{srv_api/url}/mt/v1.0/subscriptions/tenants/{tenantId}
          getDependencies: ~{provisioning-service/url}/-/cds/saas-provisioning/dependencies
          onSubscription: ~{provisioning-service/url}/-/cds/saas-provisioning/tenant/{tenantId}
          onSubscriptionAsync: true
          onUnSubscriptionAsync: true
          onUpdateSubscriptionParametersAsync: true
          callbackTimeoutMillis: 300000
    requires:
      - name: provisioning-service

 

3. mbt build & cf deploy app.

4. Subscribe to this SaaS application in the Service Marketplace on BTP.

By following these steps, you should be able to successfully create and deploy a multitenant SaaS application with a mixed CAP Java/Node.js mono repository and a shared database architecture. If you encounter any issues or have any questions, please leave a comment below. I hope you find this guide helpful!

entry.title: Re: SAP RISE Migration Options for Partner
entry.content:
Thanks for detailed blog on DMO with System Move and DMOVE2S4 options. I have some queries, would be great if you answer it.

1) For DMOVE2S4 - additional app server on target cloud would be on only on Windows Server?  If source AAS will be converted to target PAS then, in which  phase SUM will ask you for target PAS details?

2) DMOVE2S4 is only for homogenous system migration? if I have source on system on Windows system then I can use DMOVE2S4 option for system migration?

entry.title: Re: Unable to consume data from a odata service
entry.content:
Hi @Dan_Wroblewski 

Let me provide some screenshots to make myself understand.

I am providing the authentication and the base API URL, and then enabling the required entity and expanding entities.

Then opening the saved data resource, going to the list section and choosing the desired fields I run the test and the response comes positive.

Then creating a data variable from the data source as a collection of records.

On the user interface page, dragging and dropping a list item, repeating it with the data variable created earlier and then repeating the primary label with the current product and secondary label with the current netweight.

Then while previewing the app I see blank page, no details are visible as expected, just a blank page.

Can you please help me to understand what I am missing in this.
The odata service is API_PRODUCT_SRV.

Best Regards,
Yashmin Behera

SAP Community 
SAP Build

entry.title: Issue in upload/Download dialog window Issue
entry.content:
I already connected to server but can't upload file through EPM Add-in.

Whenever I click the "upload file" button, only empty box is appeared like image above(no error message).

Is there any solution for this?

entry.title: Re: Not able to deploy i-Flow
entry.content:
Hi All,

I tired today and it started working.

entry.title: UI5 Building Blocks: How to enable global variant management?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am using sap.fe.macros.Table in a freestyle app (not within the FLP) and have set the parameter variantManagement = "Control". I can save variants locally but not globally so that they are available to other users. I assume this requires creating a database table and implementing specific event handlers. However, I haven't found any relevant events in the API documentation.

The API documentation for sap.fe.macros.Table mentions: "If set with value Control, a variant management control is displayed within the table, and the table is linked to it." How can I access this control to attach the necessary event handlers? Is there any sample code available for this?

entry.title: SAP Build产品功能更新目录
entry.content:
➡️SAP Build 中的新增功能 – 2024 年第 3 季度版本

亮点功能：

  • 在SAP S/4HANA Cloud中创建扩展流程
  • 跨 SAP Build Work Zone 和 Process Automation 的集成引导式体验

 

➡️SAP Build 的新增功能 – 2024 年第 2 季度版本 

亮点功能：

  • SAP Build Apps 与 SAP Build Process Automation 之间的集成功能
  • SAP Task Center连接第三方任务提供商
  • 从 SAP Intelligent RPA 轻松迁移到 SAP Build Process Automation

 

➡️SAP Build Process Automation 2024 年 1 月新功能详解

亮点功能：

  • 在垂直布局流程编辑器中使用布局的自动化、决策和流程可见性
  • 增强录制器中的不同类型的设置活动选项

entry.title: Re: How to use lock objects in Developer Extensibility
entry.content:
for message, you have to check this, how the message is returned. for state msg, you need to make a read call to get the msg.

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/message-behavior-in-eml-entity-manipulation-language?version=sap_btp&q=message

entry.title: Configuration for Return product to own stock in third party sale
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We have return order scenario against the third party sale. Usually goods are returned to vendor, however we wnt the return order stock to be added to own stock and dont want to return to vendor.

How can we achieve this.

entry.title: Re: Enabling Access to SAP UI5 Applications for Non-BTP U...
entry.content:
Hi Khaing,

yes, this is absolutely possible, as SAP BTP differentiates between platform users and application users. Therefore, you can have trust configurations to identity providers for both of those user types within your BTP subaccount. By default, after setting up a subaccount, it will only have a trust configuration with the SAP default IDP, which uses SAP S-Users for authentication. As soon as you have set up a trust configuration to an IDP for application users, e.g. a SAP IAS tenant, and activated it for user logon, it can be used to access your custom application.

entry.title: Re: How to configure attachment type for custom BO in C4C?
entry.content:
Hi Animesh,

It's not possible to use custom defined attachment types for custom objects. Please refer to the below KBA https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3247832.

Thanks,

Jayant S

entry.title: Re: Inquiry on Printing Multiple Documents in LO-HU
entry.content: Or you can also do the configuration to create output item with "In prepration" status with APP Output Parameter Determination , then find the output items with APP Manage Output Items, select them all -> Click "Send" button

entry.title: New Modular Framework for Business Transformation Across All Functions
entry.content:
How new modular process framework can be used across all functions to do custom supplier lifecycle processes, either it can be supplier qualification/pre-qualification or miscellaneous process?

New modular process framework provide a flexible, repeatable framework for creating different supplier management processes for different types of suppliers (Domestic/Local, Overseas) using different combinations (On basis of Region, Commodity & Department/Business unit) of modular supplier management questionnaires.

Process projects allow you to tailor questionnaire content to specific suppliers, to leverage and reuse modular questionnaires across different processes, and to create custom processes for your specific supplier lifecycle activities.

Modular questionnaires for both qualification/prequalification and other process data collection activities.

Unlock creative configuration across all lifecycles by leveraging a process framework to streamline data collection. Address inefficiencies through diverse process types, both internal and external questionnaires, and reuse of existing questionnaires.

This feature is immediately available for all customers with the relevant solutions, though it requires completion of customer enablement steps.

Business Use Case - Buyer want to perform the Pre-Qualification for ACME supplier based on commodity, region and department matrix.

Based on requirement, SLP currently has a fixed set of lifecycle processes (registration, qualification, preferred), each with a single configurable template. Lifecycle processes could vary based on process type, and additionally by various commodity, region and department distinctions.

Current lifecycles result in a binary yes/no result, but data collection and qualification processes might  require a more nuanced final state.

Lastly, data collected in one questionnaire cannot be reused in another process, resulting in suppliers
potentially having to provide data multiple times.

Through New Modular Process Framework, We can collect the data for ACME supplier and reused it in another process based on Matrix (Region, Commodity & Department/Business unit).

Thanks! 

Please comment with the business use case which can not be achieved after reading the above post.

entry.title: Re: Create custom message for exceptions raised by SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Andrey,

Is this issue resolved of handling both FAILED message + Custom Error message sending back to source?

entry.title: Add dynamic date selection field in WH Monitor-Available Stock screen
entry.content:
Hello people 🙋🏼‍♂️,

My client wants to filter the Available Stock to the items that have been GR recently (today -2 days). There is no dynamic filter to update the current date at the columns filter, and I can't find the GR-Date field in the variants of the saved selection screens. Is there any other way to do this without requiring development?

Thank you for your time! 😎



GR Date is not in the Variants field

Normal column filter is not dynamic to Current Date

entry.title: Re: PULL request to deploy Github tested commits to SAP production system using gCTS
entry.content:
Hi Sunil,

we don't offer any option to create or execute Pull requests (or any other kind of workflow) inside the gCTS-App.
Comparing Commits or branches is possible.
For comparing commits, you can find the details in here https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/4a368c163b08418890a406d413933ba7/d27b12e8db0f453481adcb983a872063.html and for comparing branches in here https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/4a368c163b08418890a406d413933ba7/41623a50549c4fa3a55bef2997f4d870.html 

Also merging branches can be done in the gCTSApp: https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/4a368c163b08418890a406d413933ba7/de66bedd91ba469dab6f28dc60abcb05.html 

If conflicts occur during the merge, and gCTS can't automatically resolve the conflict, an error message is displayed. To continue the merge, you must resolve the conflicts.

Kind regards

Karin

entry.title: Re: Error Handling with API Gateway vs Service Layer in SAP
entry.content:
Those notes are relate to crystal report export using API Gateway. My problem comes when I try to use Service Layer services through API Gateway.
Service Layer services through API Gateway works fine when I send correct json data, but in case of error I cannot se appropiate error message.

entry.title: Inquiry regarding multiplex storage configuration
entry.content:
The customer is planning to migrate from a Unix environment to a Linux environment.

In a Linux environment, the customer wants to use the following CFS (Clustered File System) for sharing on SAN storage in an IQ Multiplex configuration. I am not sure if there are any restrictions on how to share storage in the manual, so I am asking for confirmation.

The CFS solution is Veritas infoscale Storage.

[SAP IQ Documentation Contents]

Any storage type can be used for SAP IQ as long as it is configured in a way that SAP IQ supports (raw devices on non-Linux platforms, local file systems for databases on all platforms, NFS on Linux, GPFS on Linux) and follows the appropriate sizing guidelines.

entry.title: Re: UI5 Building Blocks: How to enable global variant man...
entry.content:
i don't think you need to do anything,

this is example, my free style page has filter bar and tree table, their vairant are managed by one variantmanagement control.

<v:VariantManagement id="idCCBTVM" for="idFilterBar,idContractListTbl"></v:VariantManagement>

entry.title: Re: UI5 Building Blocks: How to enable global variant man...
entry.content: the filter bar is macro control,<macros:FilterBar ,

entry.title: Re: Configure To Order fulfillment along with material varaint configuration and Pricing
entry.content:
Good document!

Share such things.

entry.title: Onedrive download Links shared by SAP Technical Support
entry.content:
Our security settings in Onedrive do not allow to create public access links anymore.

The Onedrive download shared by the SAP technical support does not work with MFA after you changed your PC, Mobile Device and you stuck at the screen attached?

 

Please open a case and explain the issue. We will then reset the original setup via the SAP IT and you are able to register new with the same email as before

entry.title: Re: Bank Integration through API
entry.content: Hi Jannifer,

entry.title: Re: Bank Integration through API
entry.content: Thanks for your response. We shal be sending data to Indian bank in JSON format through CPI for Company code in India.

entry.title: Re: Alternate resources (via WC classification)not creati...
entry.content:
Hi Sandeep,

kindly check note 2469590 Alternative resources from work center classification not updated in the PDS in APO (Product Data Structure) which explain what needs to be done.
I do hope that you have no simply copied to WC as the AUSP entries needs to have the correct classification stored on the different WCs in order to be able to transfer the different modes on the WC.

entry.title: Re: Bank Integration through API
entry.content: Do we have any RFFO* program which is generic which can be used for API trigger? Pls suggest.

entry.title: Re: Bank Integration through API
entry.content: Do we have any RFFO* program which is generic which can be used for API trigger? Pls suggest. We see RFFO* programs for ACH, Check, Transfer for multiple countries but can't see any RFFO* program which is generic and can be used for API

entry.title: Re: Create 2 goal sections on PM Form from samegoal plan,...
entry.content:
Hi Andrea!

Thanks a lot for your reply and help! 

I already found the answer and I've added indeed that code to the Objective Section and it works! Thanks a lot! 🙂 

At first I was focusing on the 'general' part of the template, but you should indeed configure it for the different Objective Sections. 

Kind regards, 

Ellen

entry.title: Re: Inquiry regarding multiplex storage configuration
entry.content: Yes, you can use Veritas InfoScale Storage for sharing on SAN storage in an SAP IQ Multiplex configuration. According to the SAP IQ documentation, any storage type can be used as long as it is configured properly and follows the appropriate sizing guidelines. However, it's always a good idea to review the specific documentation for both SAP IQ and Veritas InfoScale to ensure there are no additional restrictions or special configurations required.

entry.title: Re: Query related learning hub course:'Acquiring Core ABA...
entry.content:
Hi Team,
I can not find the followings :
Acquiring Core ABAP Skills
-Working with Simple Internal Tables
In this exercise, you use iterations and simple internal tables to calculate and display the Fibonacci numbers.
Template: none
Solution: /LRN/CL_S4D400_BTS_ITERATE (global Class)
-Debugging an ABAP Program
In this exercise, you analyze ABAP code using the ABAP debugger.
Template:
/LRN/CL_S4D400_BTT_DEBUG (global Class)
Solution:
None, the class remains unchanged.

I have access to https://learning.sap.com/practice-systems/basic-abap-programming.
I tried different search strings but no hit.
Any idea?

Thanks
Laszlo

entry.title: Re: Unable to consume data from a odata service
entry.content:
Do you have a real S/4HANA that you are connecting with the plain OData data resource, putting in your credentials in the flow function? Generally, people would create a destination and then use the OData destination data source.

I imagine you are getting a CORS error and no data is returned. But whenever you don't get data, you should retrace your steps and check at each step if data appears. For example, is data returned to the data variable before getting to the UI.

entry.title: Re: Quiz: incorrect number of selections
entry.content: Completely agree

entry.title: Re: How does Optimizer perform the scheduling in SAP TM f...
entry.content:
Hello @Mohit07,

I guess you mean the behavior of VSR scheduling.

Please have a look into this note https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3259719

The VSR optimizer does not have one scheduling direction, it does it cost based. It uses its optimization approaches to get a solution that adheres to all hard constraints with compact freight orders and lowest possible costs.

Best regards,

Kathrin

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Hana DB: Feature not supported on this instance
entry.content: I also have the same error

entry.title: Re: 两家公司皆使用IFRS会计原则，需要激活1GA吗?
entry.content: Hi Fang, 使用集團合併(Group reporting)不需要激活5W2，您需要激活scope item 1SG. 1SG涵盖了intercompany elimination 和 consolidation of investment.

entry.title: Video Data Story, a brand-new way of story telling in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
The new feature "Video Data Story" will be introduced for SAP Analytics Cloud customers, since QRC1 2025. This feature will allow business users to design and create a short-form video directly inside SAP Analytics Cloud without any video editing expertise. It provides an alternative way to present the business insights using a brand-new format which could be more attractive and intuitive compared with the static content in story.

For how a Video Data Story looks like, please check the example video via:

https://video.sap.com/media/t/1_bu06re47

 

This blog will provide a preview of how Video Data Story looks like and how to create a Video Data Story.

- Enable "Video Data Story" for the related story

A new toggle is introduced in the story detail to enable the feature for related story. Please notice that Video Data Story is only supported for story designed with Optimized Story Experience.

- Create a Video Data Story 

In the story opened with view mode, a new option can be found via the context menu of each chart, which allows the user to add the selected chart into a new Video Data Story.

In the first release, the following chart types are supported to be added into Video Data Story:

Bar/Column chart, Line chart, Pie chart, Numeric Point chart.

Besides the above 4 chart types, the Text widget is also supported.

Once a chart is added, a Video Data Story design panel will be displayed in the bottom of the screen for the overview of the current Video Data Story with further configurations. 

In the design panel, the selected chart will be displayed as a tile with a preview of the animation effect so user will have the impression how this chart will be shown in the final video.

Repeat the above step to add more widgets into Video Data Story, and user can use drag and drop to change the sequence of selected widgets.

- Additional configuration for a Video Data Story

Besides adding a chart and changing the sequence, user can make some further configuration to make the final video more informative and attractive with personalized style.

  • Update the title and description to a chart

The updated title and description will also be shown in the preview of related tile.

  • Orientation

Portrait and Landscape are supported for the orientation of Video Data Story to fit with different scenarios when the Video Data Story is consumed.

  • Opening Title

User can add a title to the Video Data Story as the starting section.

  • Background Image

User can add a background image with light/dark theme from a pre-delivered lists of pictures.

If needed, users can also use a custom image by uploading the picture from local device.

  • Background Music

Similar with background image, user can also add music to the Video Data Story by selecting one music clip from a pre-delivered list.

  • Transition effect between charts

For two adjacent charts, if the data is related to each other, a special transition effect can be added to highlight the relationship in the final video. For example, user can first add a bar chart into the Video Data Story, and in the same chart, user can drill down or rank the chart, and add the same chart with updated status into Video Data Story again. In this case, user can decide if a Smart Transition effect need to be added for these two charts.

- Save and manage the Video Data Story

Once user is satisfied with the designed Video Data Story, he/she can save the Video Data Story.

The Video Data Story will be saved as a new file in SAP Analytics Cloud, which can be found and managed via the File Repository. This means, the saved Video Data Story can also be shared with other users or teams in SAP Analytics Cloud.

- View and Download the Video Data Story

The Video Data Story can be opened with View mode once it's saved. The video will be displayed in the browser directly.

User can further download the video to local device if needed. Once trigger the download, user will get a notification once the download file is ready, and the video will be downloaded as a WEBM file.

 

Above is a simple introduction about this new innovation in SAP Analytics Cloud, and of course, there will be further improvements and enhancements for Video Data Story in the future release.
